theorem_G1_lower_bound.statement: For every pair of public bijections f1,f2 of F_2^{2n}, the label-preserving split has SD >= Pr_fresh[b1 != b_2]
theorem_G1_lower_bound.reason: (b1,b2)-marginal of transformed pair is supported on {00,11}; fresh pair puts the stated mass on {01,10}; data processing for total variation
theorem_G1_lower_bound.label: THEOREM

old_G3_withdrawn.original_claim: Exact same-secret SD is independent of f1,f2 and equals 1 - (p^2+(1-p)^2)/4^n for all bijection pairs
old_G3_withdrawn.flaw: Applied the verification bijections f_i^{-1} to the FRESH comparison pair too, violating guard (L4); the fresh distribution is not invariant under arbitrary bijections
old_G3_withdrawn.label: WITHDRAWN

corrected_same_secret_law.equality_condition: A = 1 iff f1 = f2 (literal duplicate); otherwise SD strictly larger
corrected_same_secret_law.label: THEOREM

guards.L1_exact_arithmetic: fractions.Fraction end-to-end; JSON stores string fractions
guards.L2_duality_care: not invoked (no character sums over Lagrangians)
guards.L3_query_class_hygiene: distributional TV result; no Feldman/SQ/query-class statement made
guards.L4_never_transform_comparison_distributi: fresh pair (u1,b1,u2,b2) is compared in the natural domain; f1,f2 act only on the split side

interpretation_guard.comparison_distribution: two independent fresh samples from the SAME uniform secret L (natural LSN pair), NOT pre-transformed by f1 or f2
interpretation_guard.family_names: label-preserving = split (x,b)|->((f1(x),b),(f2(x),b)); label-flipping extension in Track K experiment 212
interpretation_guard.PRE_REGISTERED: hardness interpretation guarded: structural distributional gap, not a lem:m2 rate or attack claim
